underlying_goal: Fix all remaining typecheck errors, test failures, and integration issues in a multi-package monorepo project to reach 100% completion, then verify the running application and plan further UI/i18n improvements
friction_detail: Multiple iterations needed to fix LanguageModelV3 finishReason types (missing `raw` property), and Electron native module issue with better-sqlite3 required switching to web-only dev server.
brief_summary: User needed all P0 typecheck/test blockers fixed across a monorepo to reach 100% completion; Claude systematically resolved them through multiple feedback rounds, committed/pushed fixes, launched the app, and began planning further UI improvements before being interrupted.
